texto: I should like to know what sacrifices they make. I think it's the children who make the sacrifices. When I want to eat gooseberries and am not allowed to, the sacrifice is _mine_ not _Mother's_.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Grete Lainer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I should like to know what sacrifices they make. I think it's the children who make the sacrifice…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, children, sacrifices pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
